mapper.insert:
SELECT shop_board_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO shop_board (item_id, item_title, item_content, item_price, updated_at) VALUES (#{itemId},#{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{itemPrice}, sysdate)
INSERT INTO image_info (image_uuid, image_original_name, image_url, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{imageUuid}, #{imageOriginalName}, #{imageUrl}, #{itemId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT ALL
INTO image_info (image_uuid, image_original_name, image_url, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{image.imageUuid}, #{image.imageOriginalName}, #{image.imageUrl}, #{image.itemId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.select:
SELECT s.item_id, s.item_title, s.item_content, s.created_at, s.item_price, s.category, i.image_url, i.PQ_CODE, i.EMBEDDING_VALUE, i.DETECTED_CLASS
FROM shop_board s LEFT JOIN image_info i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id = #{id} -- and rownum <= 1 order by i.image_uuid

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop_board WHERE 1=1
AND CATEGORY = #{category}

SELECT item_id, item_title, item_price, image_url, category FROM ( SELECT s.item_id, s.item_title, s.item_price, s.category, i.image_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.category ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE) AS rn FROM shop_board s INNER JOIN ( SELECT item_id, image_url FROM ( SELECT item_id, image_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY image_uuid ASC) AS img_rn FROM image_info WHERE image_url IS NOT NULL ) WHERE img_rn = 1 ) i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.category IS NOT NULL ) WHERE rn <= #{perCategory} ORDER BY category, rn
mapper.delete: DELETE s, i FROM shop_board s LEFT JOIN image_info i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id =#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO shop_board (item_id, item_title, item_content, item_price, updated_at, category) VALUES (#{item.itemId}, #{item.itemTitle}, #{item.itemContent}, #{item.itemPrice}, SYSDATE, #{item.category})
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE image_feature_staging ( image_uuid VARCHAR2(500), img_feature_value BLOB, img_feature_order VARCHAR2(1000) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO image_feature_staging (image_uuid, img_feature_value, img_feature_order) VALUES (#{img.imageUuid}, #{img.imgFeatureValue}, #{img.imgFeatureOrder})
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.update: MERGE INTO image_info t USING image_feature_staging s ON (t.image_uuid = s.image_uuid) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.img_feature_value = s.img_feature_value, t.img_feature_order = s.img_feature_order, t.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
CREATE TABLE image_resnet50_staging ( image_uuid VARCHAR2(500), pq_code BLOB, embedding_value BLOB, detected_class VARCHAR2(32) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO image_resnet50_staging (image_uuid, pq_code, embedding_value, detected_class) VALUES (#{img.imageUuid}, #{img.pqCode,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{img.embeddingValue,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{img.detectedClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.update: MERGE INTO image_info t USING image_resnet50_staging s ON (t.image_uuid = s.image_uuid) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.pq_code = s.pq_code, t.embedding_value = s.embedding_value, t.detected_class = s.detected_class, t.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
